nodes.short_description: From a small team of eight plus a dog named Mal, introducing Mother Bunker VR! The zombie apocalypse is here, and you want to survive (obviously). Or at least take out as many undead as possible before you succumb. So grab your weapon, look for supplies, build your bunker, and always aim for the head.

From a small team of eight plus a dog named Mal, introducing Mother Bunker VR! The zombie apocalypse is here, and you want to survive (obviously). Or at least take out as many undead as possible before you succumb. So grab your weapon, look for supplies, build your bunker, and always aim for the head.

nodes.change_log:
Hotfix 3
- Encampment start configuration changes for both all supported devices

Hotfix 2

- More build items for the Bunker have been added
- Triangulator issue fixed
- Zombies can now drop more items
- Wave zombies have been created and added to certain scenes
- Fixed bug that allowed player to put gas tank in backpack
- Disabled Marsh Barks in encampment as they are not needed
- Updated zombie and Marsh sounds and barks (made them lower)
- Key insertion height in old downtown updated
- Increased Lake Scene frame rate
- Update door code to what is seen on the clipboard for Buena Vista Old Downtown
- Fixed issue with hand scanner blinking in and out
